args.query:
SELECT c.issueid__c, i.name
FROM "Case" c
JOIN issue__c i ON c.issueid__c = i.id
WHERE c.orderitemid__c IN (SELECT Id FROM OrderItem WHERE Product2Id = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU')
  AND c.createddate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '5 months')
GROUP BY c.issueid__c, i.name
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
        FROM "Case"
        WHERE orderitemid__c IN (SELECT Id FROM OrderItem WHERE Product2Id = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU')
        AND createddate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '5 months')
        GROUP BY issueid__c
    ) AS counts
)
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT c.issueid__c, i.name
FROM "Case" c
JOIN issue__c i ON c.issueid__c = i.id
WHERE c.orderitemid__c IN (SELECT Id FROM OrderItem WHERE Product2Id = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU')
  AND c.createddate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '5 months')
GROUP BY c.issueid__c, i.name
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
        FROM "Case"
        WHERE orderitemid__c IN (SELECT Id FROM OrderItem WHERE Product2Id = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU')
        AND createddate >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '5 months')
        GROUP BY issueid__c
    ) AS counts
)
LIMIT 1;

order_item_ids = ["802Wt0000078wz5IAA", "802Wt0000078xAAIAY", "802Wt0000078yXiIAI", "802Wt00000790WEIAY", "802Wt00000792gDIAQ", "802Wt00000792zTIAQ", "802Wt0000079315IAA", "802Wt00000793sTIAQ", "802Wt00000794F3IAI", "802Wt00000794F4IAI", "802Wt00000794JmIAI", "802Wt00000794YFIAY", "802Wt00000794YJIAY", "802Wt000007959OIAQ", "802Wt00000795akIAA", "802Wt00000795ywIAA", "802Wt000007962JIAQ", "802Wt000007968hIAA", "802Wt000007968iIAA", "802Wt00000796F5IAI", "802Wt00000796N7IAI", "802Wt00000796NAIAY", "802Wt00000796RzIAI", "802Wt00000796S0IAI", "802Wt00000796S1IAI", "802Wt00000796VDIAY", "802Wt00000796YPIAY", "802Wt00000796YQIAY", "802Wt00000796a1IAA", "802Wt00000796dFIAQ", "802Wt00000796dIIAQ", "802Wt00000796jiIAA", "802Wt00000796myIAA", "802Wt00000796oaIAA", "802Wt00000796rlIAA", "802Wt00000796tTIAQ", "802Wt00000796v0IAA", "802Wt00000796wbIAA", "802Wt00000796wcIAA", "802Wt00000797FxIAI", "802Wt00000797MQIAY", "802Wt00000797O5IAI", "802Wt00000797axIAA", "802Wt00000797e9IAA", "802Wt00000797hNIAQ", "802Wt00000797j0IAA", "802Wt00000797mDIAQ", "802Wt00000797nsIAA", "802Wt00000797pSIAQ", "802Wt00000797sfIAA", "802Wt00000797z8IAA", "802Wt000007982LIAQ", "802Wt00000798IUIAY", "802Wt00000798IVIAY", "802Wt00000798NKIAY", "802Wt00000798S9IAI", "802Wt00000798nBIAQ", "802Wt00000798rxIAA", "802Wt00000798wpIAA", "802Wt000007991dIAA", "802Wt0000079987IAA", "802Wt00000799EZIAY", "802Wt00000799HoIAI", "802Wt00000799JPIAY", "802Wt00000799T3IAI", "802Wt00000799ckIAA", "802Wt00000799fxIAA", "802Wt00000799srIAA", "802Wt00000799w5IAA", "802Wt0000079A0wIAE", "802Wt0000079A2aIAE", "802Wt0000079A49IAE", "802Wt0000079AU1IAM", "802Wt0000079AgrIAE", "802Wt0000079AqXIAU", "802Wt0000079As9IAE"]

# Format IDs for SQL IN clause
formatted_ids = "', '".join(order_item_ids)
in_clause = f"('{formatted_ids}')"

# Also include versions with # prefix for potential corruption
ids_with_hash = [f"#{id}" for id in order_item_ids]
formatted_ids_hash = "', '".join(ids_with_hash)
in_clause_hash = f"('{formatted_ids_hash}')"

both_clauses = f"IN {in_clause} OR orderitemid__c IN {in_clause_hash}"
print("__RESULT__:")
print(both_clauses)
